---
name: "Code Review Contribution Guide"
description: "Mandatory for every code review, PR review, diff review, and review of changed files. Requires loading the repository contribution guide before reviewing code."
applyTo: "**"
---

# Code Review Prerequisite

Before analyzing code changes or writing review findings, you MUST invoke the `code-review-query-contribution-guide` skill.

Do not begin the substantive review until the skill has loaded every contribution guide file. Evaluate the changes against the rules it loads, and cite the applicable guide file in any finding caused by those rules.
